baseline.observed: CLI rejected unknown preview sort values, but run_scan accepted preview_sort: Some("nonsense") and returned latest with a warning.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because run_scan returned Ok with preview_sort: latest and warnings instead of an error.

selected_candidate.name: API preview sort validation
selected_candidate.reason: Align the run_scan API boundary with CLI preview sort validation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: run_scan returns an error for unknown preview sort values, valid aliases remain accepted, and full local checks still pass.

safety_controls: The change is limited to src-tauri/src/lib.rs.
The parser still accepts latest, quality-asc, quality_asc, weakest, quality-desc, quality_desc, and strongest.
A focused unit test covers the API guard.
A focused CLI preview-sort test was rerun.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
